action.title: [GAME] Daily Playtest -- {date}
action.body:
Open ComeRosquillas from its repo (jperezdelreal/ComeRosquillas). Play for 5 minutes. Report: what works, what's broken, what feels off.

Checklist:
- [ ] Game loads without console errors
- [ ] Controls respond (arrow keys + Enter)
- [ ] Score increments correctly
- [ ] Lives decrement correctly
- [ ] Game over / level complete works

action.title: [LOG] Weekly Retro -- Week of {date}
action.body: What shipped this week? What blocked? What should change? What's the plan for next week?

action.title: [MAINT] Backlog Grooming -- {date}
action.body: Review all open issues older than 14 days. Close stale ones, re-prioritize active ones. Focus on ComeRosquillas game issues.

action.title: [TEST] Browser Compat Check -- {date}
action.body:
Test ComeRosquillas from its repo (jperezdelreal/ComeRosquillas) in Chrome, Firefox, and Edge. Report any rendering or input differences.

- [ ] Chrome: loads and plays correctly
- [ ] Firefox: loads and plays correctly
- [ ] Edge: loads and plays correctly
- [ ] Mobile (optional): touch controls work
